metadata.title: Infinex — AI That Works for Your Business
metadata.description: Infinex deploys artificial intelligence where it creates the most value — more revenue, less friction in your processes.

hero.title: AI that works for your business.
hero.subtitle: We deploy artificial intelligence where it creates the most value — more revenue, less friction in your processes.

growth.title: Grow your revenue
growth.description: Qualified leads, optimized paid acquisition, automated content, laser-targeted prospecting. We scale your pipeline.

efficiency.title: Cut your operating costs
efficiency.description: Automate repetitive tasks, generate reports in one click, produce documents effortlessly. We free up your teams.

croissance.metaTitle: Grow Your Revenue with AI — Infinex
croissance.metaDescription: Inbound leads, outbound prospecting, content, optimized ads. Discover our AI services to grow your revenue.
croissance.title: Generate more revenue with less human effort.
croissance.subtitle: Inbound leads, outbound prospecting, content at scale, optimized ads. We deploy the right weapons for every stage of your acquisition.
croissance.ctaSubtitle: A 30-minute conversation is all it takes to identify your top 3 AI growth levers.

services.benefit: Free inbound leads, every month
services.how: AI-powered SEO & GEO: we optimize your visibility on Google and AI engines (Perplexity, ChatGPT…) so prospects find you before your competitors.

services.benefit: Automated prospecting based on intent signals
services.how: AI identifies prospects already engaging with your topic on LinkedIn — posts, comments, likes on subjects related to your services. Instead of cold outreach, you reach people who already showed interest, at the right time, with the right message.

services.benefit: Fill your calendar with automated cold emailing
services.how: Personalized sequences at scale, data enrichment, and AI A/B testing to maximize open and reply rates.

services.benefit: UGC ads that convert — no filming needed
services.how: AI-generated UGC-style video ads — realistic avatars, optimized scripts, unlimited variations.

services.benefit: A steady stream of carousels for your social channels
services.how: AI-powered dynamic templates: one brief generates dozens of engaging visuals tailored to each platform.

services.benefit: Optimize Google Ads & Meta Ads without the expertise
services.how: AI analysis of your existing campaigns, detection of wasted spend, and optimization recommendations — or fully managed for you.

services.benefit: Dozens of ad creatives in minutes
services.how: Batch generation of static creatives (banners, stories, display) with message variants and formats in a single workflow.

services.benefit: Scale your business into any language
services.how: Translation, cultural adaptation, and SEO deployment in your target markets — your offer localized and conversion-ready.

services.benefit: An AI sales rep on your site, 24/7
services.how: Lead-qualifying chatbot integrated with your CRM: it answers, filters, and scores your prospects while you sleep.

services.benefit: A blog that drives traffic on autopilot
services.how: Content strategy + AI-written SEO articles published automatically — your audience grows without you lifting a finger.

services.benefit: Score your leads and focus on the right ones
services.how: AI model trained on your CRM data to predict conversion probability for each contact — prioritize the deals that close.

services.benefit: Personalized nurturing emails for every contact
services.how: Follow-up sequences adapted to each lead's behavior, written and sent automatically to keep the relationship warm until they decide.

efficacite.metaDescription: Automation, reports, dashboards, training. Discover our AI services to reduce your operating costs.
efficacite.title: Your teams on what matters. AI handles the rest.
efficacite.subtitle: Automate time-consuming tasks, eliminate manual errors, and produce in seconds what used to take hours. Without hiring.
efficacite.ctaSubtitle: In 30 minutes, we identify the processes to automate first and quantify the real gains for your team.

services.benefit: Generate audit reports in a few clicks
services.how: AI pipeline that collects, analyzes, and formats your data into a structured, personalized report — what took 3 hours now takes 10 minutes.

services.benefit: Automate your repetitive admin tasks
services.how: Processing incoming emails, data entry, follow-ups, approvals — everything that repeats is scriptable and delegatable to AI.

services.benefit: A dashboard that's always up to date, effortlessly
services.how: Connect your data sources (CRM, ERP, Sheets…) into an automated dashboard with real-time smart alerts.

services.benefit: Professional PowerPoints generated automatically
services.how: Your data and briefs transformed into structured, on-brand presentations — without opening PowerPoint once.

services.benefit: Your documents formatted in seconds
services.how: Automated formatting (Word, PDF, reports) from your raw content — visual consistency guaranteed without manual effort.

services.benefit: Your teams master Excel & AI tools in weeks
services.how: Hands-on training with Claude as a teaching assistant: personalized exercises, instant answers, and accelerated skill-building.

services.benefit: Automated support that handles 80% of questions
services.how: AI chatbot trained on your knowledge base — handles common requests, escalates complex cases, available 24/7.

services.benefit: Process 3x more emails without hiring
services.how: Automatic classification, reply suggestions, and automated responses for recurring emails — your inbox never overflows.

services.benefit: Extract data from your documents effortlessly
services.how: OCR + AI to read invoices, contracts, forms and automatically populate your tools — no more manual data entry.

services.benefit: Automate your HR onboarding from A to Z
services.how: Contract generation, automatic document sending, reminders and signature tracking — every new hire onboarded in a few clicks.

services.benefit: Analyze your contracts and legal documents in seconds
services.how: AI extraction of key clauses, version comparison, alerts on sensitive points — without mobilizing a lawyer for every read.

services.benefit: Track your competitors and market in real time
services.how: Automated monitoring (pricing, news, social media) compiled weekly into a clear digest — always one step ahead.

getStarted.metaDescription: Tell us your challenge and we'll show you how AI can grow your revenue or cut your costs.
getStarted.title: Tell us where it hurts.
getStarted.subtitle: 30 minutes is all it takes to identify your best AI levers — growth or efficiency.

benefits.title: More revenue, less effort
benefits.description: Qualified leads, automated prospecting, content that converts — we activate the right levers.

benefits.title: Lower costs within weeks
benefits.description: We automate what slows you down: reporting, admin, data entry, follow-ups. Your teams focus on what matters.

benefits.title: Real results, not slide decks
benefits.description: No 6-month audits. We deploy, measure, and iterate. First gains visible in 3 weeks.

form.needsPlaceholder: Tell us about your current challenges and what you'd like to achieve with AI...
form.source: How did you hear about Infinex?
form.success: Message sent! We'll get back to you very soon.
form.redirecting: Book a slot to speed things up — redirecting automatically...

blog.metaDescription: AI strategies, automation, training: actionable insights for SMBs.
blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Actionable strategies to integrate AI into your business.

postCta.title: Ready to take action?
postCta.description: Let's discuss your project and define your AI strategy together.

about.metaDescription: Meet Infinex and Meidy Baffou, founder. Our mission: implement AI where it creates the most value for SMBs.
about.title: AI that builds, not destroys.
about.subtitle: Infinex deploys AI where it creates the most value for SMBs: more revenue, less friction. Concrete results in weeks.

founder.name: Meidy Baffou
founder.role: Founder of Infinex — AI Trainer & Consultant
founder.description: I work with small and mid-sized businesses to implement AI where it creates the most value: content creation, process automation, hands-on tooling. My goal is to turn every team member into an AI-powered super-employee — faster, more impactful, more autonomous.

vision.title: Our vision of AI
vision.text: AI should not replace your people, it should amplify them. A well-equipped team of 10 can deliver the impact of 50. We believe in human-centered AI — one that builds, not destroys.
vision.text2: If your goal is to cut headcount, we are not the right fit. Our approach is performance through augmentation, not elimination. Every tool, every training, every deployment we deliver has one purpose: making your teams more performant.

items.title: AI content creation
items.description: UGC videos, carousels, static ads, product visuals... We train and equip you to produce any type of visual content with generative AI.

items.title: Process automation
items.description: Identify repetitive tasks slowing your teams down and automate them with custom AI workflows. Less friction, more value.

items.title: AI tool deployment
items.description: Chatbots, internal assistants, reporting tools, smart dashboards... We deploy AI solutions tailored to your business.

items.title: Team training
items.description: Hands-on workshops to make your people autonomous with AI tools. The goal: AI-powered super-employees, not replaced employees.

cta.title: Ready to take action?
cta.subtitle: Let's talk about your project and identify where AI can create the most value for your business.

formationUgc.metaDescription: Produce carousels, videos, UGC ads and static ads with generative AI. Full-day hands-on workshop, 1,000 EUR excl. VAT.
formationUgc.title: Learn to produce any type of visual content with AI, in one day.
formationUgc.subtitle: Carousels, videos, UGC ads, static ads... In a full-day, 100% hands-on workshop, you learn to master every format and produce your first pieces live. The goal: leave fully autonomous.

problem.title: Producing visual content is expensive and slow
problem.description: Designers, photographers, editors, iterations... Producing quality visuals and videos requires a significant budget and weeks of production. Every new format or variation restarts the cycle.

solution.title: Generative AI changes everything
solution.description: With the right tools and techniques, you can produce carousels, UGC videos, static and animated ads in minutes. Unlimited variations, visual consistency, zero external dependency.

program.title: What you will produce during the workshop
program.subtitle: A dense, 100% hands-on program. You produce each content type live and leave with your own creations.

items.title: UGC video ads with AI avatars
items.description: Create realistic UGC video ads from scratch: avatars, scripts, lip sync. Your avatars say exactly what you want.

items.title: Carousels and static visuals
items.description: Generate LinkedIn carousels, product visuals and high-impact static ads. Master prompts and image generation tools.

items.title: AI scripts and copywriting
items.description: Copywriting frameworks adapted to each format. Use ChatGPT/Claude to generate and iterate scripts that convert.

items.title: Production workflow at scale
items.description: From brief to final content: reusable templates, audience-specific variations, creative A/B testing. Be fully autonomous by end of day.

audience.title: This workshop is for you if...

items.title: Marketing / Growth Manager
items.description: You want to scale your ad content production without blowing your budget.

items.title: SMB Owner
items.description: You want to produce your own visual content without relying on an agency or studio.

items.title: Freelancer / Consultant
items.description: You want to add AI visual content creation to your service offering.

items.title: Community Manager
items.description: You need to produce visual content regularly with limited resources.

carousel.title: Stunning results
carousel.subtitle: Here are examples of AI-generated content, like the ones you will produce during the workshop.

details.title: Practical details
details.sessionNote: Ultra hands-on workshop: you produce every content type live (UGC videos, carousels, static ads). The goal is for you to be 100% autonomous by the end of the day.

trainer.name: Meidy Baffou
trainer.title: AI that empowers your teams
trainer.description: I work with small and mid-sized businesses to implement AI where it creates the most value: content creation, process automation, hands-on tooling. My goal is to turn every team member into an AI-powered super-employee — faster, more impactful, more autonomous.
trainer.vision: Our belief: AI should not replace your people, it should amplify them. A well-equipped team of 10 can deliver the impact of 50. We believe in human-centered AI — one that builds, not destroys. If your goal is to cut headcount, we are not the right fit. Our approach is performance through augmentation, not elimination.

formationExcel.metaDescription: Become the best Excel user in your company with AI. Half-day workshop, 500 EUR excl. VAT.
formationExcel.title: Become the best Excel user in your company, with AI.
formationExcel.subtitle: In half a day, learn to use Claude, ChatGPT and AI tools to turn Excel into a superpower: complex formulas in plain language, instant analysis, automatic dashboards.

problem.title: Excel remains underutilized in most companies
problem.description: Complex formulas, pivot tables, VBA macros... Most users only leverage 10% of Excel's capabilities. The result: hours wasted on manual tasks, calculation errors, and analyses that take days instead of minutes.

solution.title: AI turns Excel into a superpower
solution.description: With Claude for Excel and the right AI tools, you describe what you want in plain English and get the formula, chart or analysis in seconds. No more memorizing complex syntax — AI becomes your permanent Excel assistant.

program.title: What you will learn during the workshop
program.subtitle: A dense, 100% hands-on program. You work on your own Excel files and leave with immediately applicable skills.

items.title: Claude for Excel & AI assistants
items.description: Install and master Claude for Excel, ChatGPT and AI extensions. Learn to formulate your requests for precise, actionable results.

items.title: Formulas and analysis in plain language
items.description: Generate complex formulas (XLOOKUP, INDEX/MATCH, pivot tables) simply by describing your need in plain English. No more hours searching for the right syntax.

items.title: Automatic dashboards and visualizations
items.description: Turn raw data into visual dashboards and impactful charts in a few clicks. AI structures, formats and suggests the best visualizations.

items.title: Automation and data cleaning
items.description: Clean, transform and consolidate your files automatically. AI-generated VBA macros, assisted Power Query, anomaly detection — save hours every week.

audience.title: This workshop is for you if...

items.title: Financial Controller / Finance
items.description: You spend hours on Excel reports and want to automate your recurring analyses.

items.title: Manager / Project Lead
items.description: You use Excel daily but only leverage a fraction of its potential.

items.title: Assistant / Office Manager
items.description: You manage complex files and want to save time on formatting and data processing.

items.title: Consultant / Freelancer
items.description: You want to impress clients with expert-level Excel analyses and dashboards, produced in record time.

details.title: Practical details
details.sessionNote: Ultra hands-on workshop: you work on your own Excel files with real-time AI assistance. The goal is for you to be 100% autonomous by the end of the half-day.

formationProspection.metaDescription: Set up automated prospecting based on LinkedIn intent signals in half a day. 500 EUR excl. VAT.
formationProspection.title: Launch your automated prospecting in one afternoon.
formationProspection.subtitle: With Gojiberry AI, Claude and LinkedIn, set up a system that detects prospects already interested in your topic and reaches out automatically. You leave with your first active campaign.

problem.title: Cold prospecting no longer works
problem.description: Generic messages, plummeting reply rates, annoyed prospects... Traditional LinkedIn outreach has become background noise everyone ignores. You waste time contacting people with zero interest in what you offer.

solution.title: Target only prospects showing interest
solution.description: AI analyzes intent signals on LinkedIn — posts, comments, likes on topics related to your services — to identify people already interested in your space. You reach them at the right time, with a personalized, relevant message. Reply rates skyrocket.

program.title: What you will set up during the workshop
program.subtitle: A 100% hands-on program. You leave with an operational prospecting system and your first campaign launched.

items.title: Gojiberry AI setup
items.description: Install and configure the intent signal detection tool. Define your targeting criteria: topics, keywords, types of LinkedIn interactions to monitor.

items.title: LinkedIn signal-based targeting
items.description: Learn to identify prospects who post, comment or like content related to your offer. Build qualified prospect lists in real time.

items.title: Message writing with Claude
items.description: Use AI to craft personalized, contextualized outreach messages. Each message references the prospect's LinkedIn activity — no more generic templates.

items.title: Launch your first campaign
items.description: Put it all together: automated sequences, response tracking, smart follow-ups. You leave the workshop with your first active campaign generating leads.

audience.title: This workshop is for you if...

items.title: SMB / Startup Founder
items.description: You want to generate qualified leads without hiring a sales rep or spending hours on LinkedIn.

items.title: Sales / Business Developer
items.description: You want to fill your pipeline with genuinely interested prospects, not cold contacts.

items.title: Growth Manager / Marketing
items.description: You want to automate outbound acquisition with a smart, scalable system.

items.title: Consultant / Freelancer
items.description: You want to land clients by targeting decision-makers already talking about your areas of expertise.

details.title: Practical details
details.sessionNote: Ultra-concrete workshop: you configure your tools, create your messages and launch your first campaign live. The goal is for you to be 100% operational by the end of the afternoon.

trainer.name: Meidy Baffou
trainer.title: AI that empowers your teams
trainer.description: I work with small and mid-sized businesses to implement AI where it creates the most value: content creation, process automation, hands-on tooling. My goal is to turn every team member into an AI-powered super-employee — faster, more impactful, more autonomous.
trainer.vision: Our belief: AI should not replace your people, it should amplify them. A well-equipped team of 10 can deliver the impact of 50. We believe in human-centered AI — one that builds, not destroys. If your goal is to cut headcount, we are not the right fit. Our approach is performance through augmentation, not elimination.

privacy.metaDescription: Privacy policy and data protection for the infinex.studio website.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy

controller.title: Data Controller
controller.content:
EI Meidy BAFFOU
SIRET: 80473268300045
Email: contact@makeitglobal-agency.com

dataCollected.title: Data Collected
dataCollected.content: We only collect data that you submit through our contact form: first name, last name, email, phone number, company, job title, revenue range, and services of interest. No data is collected automatically beyond standard server logs.

purpose.title: Purpose of Processing
purpose.content: Your data is used to respond to your inquiries, follow up for commercial purposes, and improve our services. We never sell, rent, or share your data with third parties for commercial purposes.

storage.title: Data Hosting and Storage
storage.content: The website is hosted by Vercel Inc. (USA). Form submissions are stored in Google Sheets (Google LLC, USA) for commercial follow-up and transmitted via Telegram Bot API for internal notifications. These services comply with GDPR through Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs).

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.content: Your data is retained for the duration of the business relationship and for a maximum of 3 years after the last contact. You may request deletion at any time.

rights.title: Your Rights (GDPR)
rights.content: Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the right to access, rectify, delete, port, and object to the processing of your personal data. To exercise your rights, contact us at contact@makeitglobal-agency.com.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content: This website does not use advertising cookies or third-party trackers. Only strictly necessary technical cookies may be used for the website to function properly.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Services
thirdParty.content: The website uses Google Analytics for audience measurement. This data is anonymized and cannot be used to personally identify you. You can disable tracking through your browser settings.

terms.metaDescription: Terms and conditions of use for the infinex.studio website.
terms.title: Terms of Use

object.title: Purpose
object.content: These Terms of Use govern access to and use of the infinex.studio website, published by EI Meidy BAFFOU (SIRET: 80473268300045). By using this website, you fully accept these terms.

services.title: Services Description
services.content: Infinex provides AI consulting services for SMBs: AI audit and strategy, automation deployment, and team training. The website allows you to discover our offerings, read our articles, and contact us through the dedicated form.

access.title: Website Access
access.content: The website is freely accessible to any user with an Internet connection. The publisher reserves the right to suspend or interrupt access for maintenance or updates, without prior notice or compensation.

ip.title: Intellectual Property
ip.content: All content on this website (text, images, logos, graphics, videos) is protected by intellectual property law. Any unauthorized reproduction or use is prohibited.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.content: The publisher strives to provide accurate information on the website. However, it cannot be held liable for errors, omissions, or results obtained from using this information. The website is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind.

modifications.title: Changes to Terms
modifications.content: The publisher reserves the right to modify these Terms at any time. Changes take effect upon publication on the website. Continued use of the website after modification constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

law.title: Applicable Law
law.content: These Terms are governed by French law. Any dispute relating to the use of the website shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Paris, France.
